missions.title: Mastery Module 1: Reflection of light and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering reflection of light, spherical mirrors, mirror formula and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: Reflection of light
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 12, Chapter: Optics, Section detailing Reflection of light
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of Reflection of light is heavily tested in recent NEET papers.
Applying the core principles of Reflection of light correctly is essential for solving complex multi-step problems in Optics.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the subtle edge cases of Reflection of light during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with Reflection of light.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify biological structures related specifically to Reflection of light.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when Reflection of light is integrated with other concepts in Optics.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently test the application of Reflection of light in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: What are the critical factors or principles governing Reflection of light?
Describe a scenario where applying the concept of Reflection of light can lead to a common student error.
